title: × Pseudadenia vitosana

This hybrid orchid is part of the Asparagaceae family, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The Asparagaceae family includes various types of orchids, as well as other flowering plants like asparagus and agapanthus. Pseudadenia vitosana is a unique and rare orchid species, known for its distinct characteristics and growth habits.
